title: Slightly Better Mobs
description: yet an another better mobs pack, but with a different design approach atleast
body:
Check out my Youtube channel, I make Youtube videos: https://youtube.com/@siberianugget

**[Requires Optifine]
[For Fabric, Forge, & NeoForge Users:] (Recommended)**

https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

https://modrinth.com/mod/nopackcompatcheck

**["Human Era: Villagers & Illagers" Recommended for better experience when applying this pack, since this pack was made to enhance the experience of "Human Era: Villagers & Illagers"]**


**Pack Description:** This resource pack is yet an another better mobs pack or mobs refreshed, like, theres alot of better mobs pack, but this pack has a different approach with modeling, and instead of making it wide or big or however, this pack is more of a take of what the mobs could probably look like if i were Mojang's team since like back then, with a different approach but still faithful to the jappa style, that's why it's more of a slight tweak.

There are some mobs however that have a full change due to some ideas in mind, specifically the fantasy mobs, like, i wanna give them a certain feel and mistique, i have no reason to drastically change some of them, but i wanna do experimentations of modeling and concepting mob designs while still retaining the vanilla style, the results is that the models can be a bit questionable... but i mean, not everyone's preference, but i'm gonna roll.




This pack has a choice of not adding more variants, and this is because this pack is meant to be compatible with other packs that uses the same mechanic as the pack "Human Player Mobs" (EMF and ETF needs to be fixed for this, this works on Optifine somehow), which means that if theres a pack that uses model2.jem or model3.jem, or the properties mechanic for the CEM models, this pack should work on them, atleast in Optifine




**PMC Account:** https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/stalkermcnuggets/
